sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2351" key="ai)qrodo/nhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰθρο-δόνητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n2351.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whirling through ether</tr_>, ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2583.tlg001:298" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">298</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
